justification: All 5 ACs implemented with correct HTTP codes and error codes (200, 409/EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE, 400/INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT, 404/USER_NOT_FOUND, 200 idempotent). AC5 same-email idempotency is distinctly handled from AC2 conflict check — the handler skips both findByEmail and updateEmail when the email matches. No external validation library used (local regex). 13 tests cover all 5 ACs with explicit AC-prefixed test names. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 5 ACs to specific tests. files_changed lists both handler and test file.

observations.text: AC5 idempotency correctly distinct from AC2: same-email skips conflict check entirely rather than hitting findByEmail and misinterpreting the match as a conflict
Guard ordering is cheap-first (format validation before DB calls), with a dedicated test verifying this
No external validation library — uses local email regex as required
AC3 thoroughly tested with 7 parameterised invalid-format cases
Handler factory pattern with injected repository makes tests clean without mocking frameworks
All test names explicitly reference AC numbers for traceability
